claim_boundary: Fisher+Curie-verified DIAGNOSTIC g-sweep (300 reps, MCSE ~0.013-0.018 -- NOT the SR475 claim threshold). Finding: under-coverage shrinks with sample size (SD-slope bias -8%->-2% as g 8->32), so q2 is surmountable, NOT a method wall; sigma Wald is g-robust near-nominal. BUT: this does NOT certify >=0.94 (g32 Wilson95 CIs straddle 0.95), does NOT promote coverage_status off planned, does NOT advance interval_status (a separate unmeasured rung), and does NOT promote supported. At the deployment g=8 q2 still under-covers 0.87-0.91. Re-run plan to certify: g>=32, >=500 paired-seed reps + an interval-reliability rung. g/N confounded (n_each fixed). Correlation target is a documented near-miss (structural Wald-width). balanced_tree fails at non-power-of-2 tips.
